description: Create the basic project-local runtime directory structure needed for future autonomy work, such as `.bowman/runtime` and `.bowman/runtime/audit`, without removing or destabilizing current behavior.

reflections.context: Take a first implementation step toward durable autonomy state instead of leaving the work at the architecture-note level.
reflections.outcome: Extended ensureProjectStructure so newly initialized projects create .bowman/runtime and .bowman/runtime/audit alongside aims, archived-aims, and phases. Verified with backend build and full backend test suite.
reflections.effectiveness: This was a small but useful slice because it establishes a concrete place for future autonomy state without destabilizing current behavior.
reflections.lesson: Early autonomy work benefits from laying down project-local seams first. Small structural additions make later persistence features much cleaner.
reflections.pattern: Create the directory and ownership boundary before introducing new state files or runtime logic.

status.comment: Implemented the first runtime scaffold: backend project initialization now creates .bowman/runtime and .bowman/runtime/audit for future durable autonomy state.
